ham.subject: Out of Office: John Doe – 15–25 May
ham.body:
Hi Team,

I will be out of the office from **15 May** until **25 May** and will have limited access to email during this time.  I will respond to any messages as soon as possible upon my return.

If you need immediate assistance regarding the Q2 reporting, please contact Sarah Lee (sarah.lee@company.com) or the finance team (finance@company.com).

Thank you for your understanding.

Best regards,
John

spam.subject: QuickBooks Invoice #987654 – Immediate Action Required
spam.body:
Dear Valued Customer,

Your QuickBooks subscription has not been renewed.  The attached invoice (Invoice #987654) reflects the outstanding balance of **$1,250.00**.  Please review the invoice and complete payment within **7 days** to avoid interruption of services.

Failure to pay by the due date will result in suspension of your QuickBooks access and may incur additional late‑fee charges.

To settle the invoice securely, click the link below:

<URL>

If you have already made the payment or believe this is an error, please reply to this email or contact our billing support at billing@quickbooks.com.

Thank you for your prompt attention to this matter.

Regards,
QuickBooks Billing Team
